full_text:
Zhang Cheng [White Rider] 張晟[白騎]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Cheng [White Rider] (張晟[白騎])was born in Henei. Bandit leader, famed for his white horse. He was driven out by Du Ji and killed by Ma Teng. Zhang Cheng [White Rider] lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
